mapper.select: SELECT USERID, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE FROM TUSER ORDER BY USERID ASC
SELECT USERID, PASSWORD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM tuser WHERE userid = #{userid}
SELECT USERID, PASSWORD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM tuser WHERE userid = #{userid} AND password = #{password}
SELECT USERID, PASSWORD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM tuser WHERE userid=#{userid}
